name: chart-radial-label
visual_summary: The chart-radial-label component displays a circular chart with a central label. It is typically used to visualize progress or ratio values. Developers would use this component in contexts where a simple, data-driven design is required.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-radial-label
Description: The chart-radial-label component displays a circular chart with a central label. It is typically used to visualize progress or ratio values. Developers would use this component in contexts where a simple, data-driven design is required.
Style: material, compact
Interactions: clickable
Tags: chart, radial, progress, ratio

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
